displayName: A3 — IA-strip consent gate violation (LGPD Art. 9)

documentation.content: Triggered when consentGate.ts throws HttpsError('failed-precondition', 'consent-not-captured'). Indicates an attempt to invoke Gemini IA without LGPD consent recorded. The gate is working — every fire is a UX/workflow gap to investigate, not a privacy breach. Compliance: LGPD Art. 9, DICQ 4.4. Runbook: docs/observability/RUNBOOK.md#a3-consent-gate-violation

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_function" AND resource.labels.function_name="classifyStripGemini" AND severity="ERROR" AND (textPayload:"consent-not-captured" OR jsonPayload.message:"consent-not-captured")
